exams.title: De on thi TNTHPT Tin hoc 0501
exams.description: De mau de kiem thu he thong on thi, cham diem va thong ke ket qua. Giao vien co the chinh sua hoac nhap de moi bang JSON.

questions.text: Trong mang may tinh, thiet bi nao dung de dinh tuyen goi tin giua cac mang?
questions.explanation: Router la thiet bi thuc hien chuc nang dinh tuyen giua cac mang khac nhau.

questions.text: The HTML nao bieu dien tieu de lon nhat tren trang?
questions.explanation: Trong HTML, h1 la muc tieu de cao nhat.

questions.text: Danh gia cac nhan dinh sau ve tri tue nhan tao:
questions.explanation: AI yeu chi giai quyet tot cac nhiem vu chuyen biet; du lieu huan luyen anh huong manh den ket qua.

statements.text: AI tao sinh co the tao van ban hoac hinh anh tu du lieu da hoc.
statements.explanation: Day la nang luc dien hinh cua AI tao sinh.

statements.text: AI manh hien da duoc trien khai pho bien trong truong hoc.
statements.explanation: AI manh theo nghia tu nhan thuc van chua ton tai thuc te.

questions.text: Dia chi IP co chuc nang chinh nao sau day?
questions.explanation: Dia chi IP dung de dinh danh thiet bi trong mang va ho tro truyen goi tin den dung noi nhan.

choices.text: Dinh danh thiet bi tren mang

questions.text: Danh gia cac nhan dinh sau ve CSS:
questions.explanation: CSS dieu khien cach hien thi cua phan tu HTML, khong thay the HTML trong viec tao cau truc noi dung.

statements.text: CSS dung de dinh dang mau sac, bo cuc va kieu chu cua trang web.
statements.explanation: CSS chiu trach nhiem ve phan trinh bay giao dien.

statements.text: CSS la ngon ngu dung de thay the hoan toan HTML trong cau truc trang.
statements.explanation: HTML tao cau truc, CSS chi dinh dang phan hien thi.
